justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent consistently understood the user's date and time preferences throughout the conversation.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent proposed reasonable alternatives and avoided re-offering previously rejected slots, though it could have offered a wider range of options in some turns.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent was mostly efficient, but there were a couple of instances where it re-iterated the same limited options, slightly prolonging the conversation.
justifications.customer_experience: The interaction was generally smooth and professional, with the agent maintaining a polite tone and avoiding jargon.
justifications.recovery_quality: The agent recovered well by expanding its search and maintaining context, but it did re-present the same limited options multiple times, which slightly hindered the recovery process.
